claim_boundary: This is negative prefix evidence only; it does not satisfy G005 or any full-corpus paper-target win.
diagnosis: Per-token threshold calibration executes and suppresses no-button false positives but does not recover mouse-button recall.

Keyboard key accuracy regressed versus the previous global-threshold factorized prefix probe (0.0192 vs ~0.0239), because many per-token thresholds fall to 0.05 and increase negative-bin denominator/overfire.
The next recipe-aligned branch must improve video/window conditioning rather than treating thresholding as the primary fix.
next_action: Use compact luma-window video tokens with the same factorized masked-diffusion IDM objective; old supervised/state-action branches remain diagnostic only.
